change_summary: Added a left-side ION Context rail anchored beside the ChatGPT composer.
Rail supports context-pack insertion, project package refresh, context sync ZIP request, queue workflow pack import, receipt read shortcut, and right queue expansion.
Queue workflow import reuses the existing queue-pack parser/import path.
Floating ION rails are excluded from ChatGPT send/stop button discovery.
validation: git diff --check scoped to changed browser extension files
